title: [Snyk Code] Command Injection
description:
## Command Injection

**Severity:** medium
**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `tools/ec2_bench_status.py`
**Location:** line 87, column 15 to line 87, column 34
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-78
### Snippet (tools/ec2_bench_status.py:85-89)
```
  85 | 
  86 |     for inst in instance_ids:
  87 |         inv = wait_for_invocation(command_id, inst, region=args.region, profile=args.profile)
  88 |         print("=" * 80)
  89 |         print(f"Instance: {inst}")
```

**Issue Key:** 5b713713-8205-499c-b09c-7a0c48ffa034

### Details
Command Injection

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Current stance: dismiss. The flagged call is wait_for_invocation() at line 87 — instance_id originates from the AWS API response (InstanceId field), not user input. Passed as a list element to subprocess, not interpolated into a shell string. Pending triple-check before formal dismissal.
